text:
Synopsis

While on their way back to Resembool to have Ed's arm repaired, Ed and Al buy earrings as souvenirs for Winry to prevent her from getting mad about the broken automail. Later on, Ed fights an assassin and his automail gets broken again, and he buys more earrings for Winry to avoid her wrath. Winry explains that she decided to pierce her ears after meeting Riza on the day Ed decided to become a State Alchemist. When the brothers ready to leave, Winry reveals she has pierced her ears a second time to accomodate the newest set, causing the boys to flip out at the idea of her piercing her ears every time she receives more jewelry rather than alternating the sets.

Meanwhile, Riza explains to Rebecca that she grew her hair long after meeting Winry that same day. Rebecca comments on how simple a reason that is, and Riza says that reasons are always simple. To explain her choice, she remarks that they are all living in a simple world - where when they pull the trigger, their enemies die.

Notes

This Bonus Episode is adapted from content in Bonus Chapter: Simple People.
In this version of the story, Ed and Al encounter a Xingese martial artist and criminal long before having met Ling Yao, although the martial artist does not openly admit to being Xingese.
